text:
First, note that time zones did not exist in 1464. However, for the purpose of this exercise, we assume modern time zone rules applied historically.

Sydney is UTC+10 (AEST) or UTC+11 (AEDT) during daylight saving.  
London is UTC+0 (GMT) or UTC+1 (BST) during daylight saving.  
But in 1464, no daylight saving existed, so we use standard offsets: Sydney = UTC+10, London = UTC+0.

9 PM Sydney = 21:00 UTC+10.  
UTC = 21:00 − 10 hours = 11:00 UTC.  
London (UTC+0) = 11:00 same day.

FINAL_ANSWER: 11:00, May 8, 1464
